blockingIssues.description: About page omits the required Skinner Layne attribution in the Exosphere formation-lineage section.
Home page Two Engagement Paths section does not explicitly list required offerings (Unlock, Stack Build, Sparring, Discovery, Build, Train, Retainer).
Legacy src/pages/projects.astro deletion was required but not included in the reviewed feature commit.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update content-worker procedure to align with this repo's validator model (services.yaml maps test/typecheck/lint to build) and require explicit evidence for manual/browser verification. If required steps are skipped, workers must set followedProcedure=false and record deviations.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Across page-home, page-work, page-services, page-about, and page-approach reviews, transcript skeletons showed build/curl/grep checks but no complete manual validation evidence while handoffs reported followedProcedure=true.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: When defining features, duplicate critical must-have details in expectedBehavior and verificationSteps (not only long description text) so omissions are caught consistently.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Blocking misses in page-home (named offerings), page-about (Skinner Layne attribution), and page-work (projects.astro deletion) were each described in long-form feature text but incompletely reinforced in acceptance fields.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify whether 'component pattern' means a reusable component file or a CSS-class pattern to avoid unnecessary lookup churn.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: page-approach review observed attempted lookup of src/components/DisciplineDescription.astro while implementation used established CSS pattern classes.

rejectedObservations.observation: Repeated content-worker procedure drift reports across multiple features.
Home feature references vault/people/Noah (The Meta Father).md while the vault file is Noah Revoy.md.
rejectedObservations.reason: one-off mission metadata mismatch; not a shared repository state update

rejectedObservations.observation: No shared checklist exists to ensure required deletions are staged.
rejectedObservations.reason: covered by broader recommendation to strengthen acceptance/verification fields
